zh.lifeSummary: 當Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd於大約1270年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾時，他的父親Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn31歲，母親Margred ferch Hwfa22歲。他於1300年與Catrin ferch Dafydd在英國威爾斯福林爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd于大约1270年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾时，他的父亲Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn31岁，母亲Margred ferch Hwfa22岁。他于1300年与Catrin ferch Dafydd在英国威尔斯福林爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年之后。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
meanings: A Welsh name derived from the Greek, signifying 'blooming luxuriantly, flourishing, rich.'. It is from Ithel that we have first the name Ap-Ithel, then by corruption, Bithell and Bethell.

nameMeanings.name: Bleddyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from an ancient byname from blaidd ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -yn. Blaidd was often used in medieval Welsh as a term for a hero.

en.lifeSummary: When Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd was born about 1270, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn, was 31 and his mother, Margred ferch Hwfa, was 22. He married Catrin ferch Dafydd in 1300, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1350.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd est né environ 1270, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margred ferch Hwfa, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Catrin ferch Dafydd en 1300, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1350.

ja.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwydが約1270年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddynは31歳，母Margred ferch Hwfaは22歳であった。1300年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアでCatrin ferch Dafyddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred ferch Hwfa(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1300년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Catrin ferch Dafydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bleddyn ap Ithel Llwyd родился около 1270 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ithel Llwyd  ap Bleddyn было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margred ferch Hwfa, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Catrin ferch Dafydd в 1300 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1350 г.
